_comment: Hand-authored SauceDemo ground truth (QUAL-01 / D-07). Committed + diffable; the coverage metric reads this as the reference. Pages keyed by public URL; normalize_url strips scheme+host to path-only so the in-cluster host (http://saucedemo:80) the explorer sees still matches. No live deps, no keys, no fingerprints (humans author from URLs; fingerprint matching is the primary path when the graph supplies one).
